case_title: ANDREW LAMBERT VS. SAMANTHA GIANINNI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF SUSAN PARKINSON RE LOST ORIGINAL 3 DAY NOTICE, DEC OF SERVICE, ASSIGNMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GIANINNI, SAMANTHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 706 KEARNY STREET #101, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT GIANINNI, SAMANTHA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW SERVED MAR-09-2015, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GIANINNI, SAMANTHA
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAMBERT, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT GIANINNI, SAMANTHA DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
